title: NATO is getting its own Starlink satellite constellation as HALO brings Europe and Canada together to improve resilience and high-speed comms
summary: The project could also allow NATO members to combine national capabilities without creating a single satellite fleet controlled by one country. “I’m really pleased to announce…HALO, opening a new chapter in allied space operations,” Šekerinska said.
